- if (condition) true_action

- if (condition) true_action else false_action
  
如果*condition*为真，执行*true_action*，否则执行*false_action*

```{r if, echo = TRUE,prompt=FALSE}
x <- 85# mark of test
if (x > 90) {
    "A"
  } else if (x > 80) {
    "B"
  } else if (x > 50) {
    "C"
  } else {
    "F"
  }
```



# 向量化的条件判断{.nextsteps }
  
基于向量的条件判断可以用*ifelse()*

```{r ifs, echo = TRUE,prompt=FALSE}
x <- 1:10
ifelse(x %% 2 == 0, "even", "odd")

```
  
# 向量化的条件判断2{.nextsteps }
  
基于向量的条件判断也可以用*dplyr::case_when()*

```{r case_when, echo = TRUE,prompt=FALSE}
x <- 85# mark of test
dplyr::case_when(
x > 90~ "A",
x > 80~ "B",
x > 60~ "C",
is.na(x)~ "缺考",
T~"F"
)
```



# switch结构：{.nextsteps }

switch结构主要用于多条件判断,但不适用于数值型数据的比较判断，主要用于字符型数据
  
```{r switch, echo = TRUE,prompt=FALSE}
x <- "a"
 switch(x,
    a = "option 1",
    b = "option 2",
    c = "option 3",
    stop("Invalid `x` value")
  )
```


# for循环：{.nextsteps }

for循环是在向量的基础上执行迭代运算，基本用法如：for (item in vector) perform_action


```{r for1, echo = TRUE,prompt=FALSE}
for (i in 1:3) {
  print(i)
}
for (i in 1:10) {
  if (i < 3) 
    next#跳过本条循环，进入下次

  print(i)
  
  if (i >= 5)
    break# 结束循环
}

```
   
    
# for循环的注意事项：{.nextsteps }
  
- 如果要产生新数据，记得提前分配数据收集结构  

```{r for2, echo = TRUE,prompt=FALSE}
means <- c(1, 50, 20)
out <- as.list(1:length(means))
# out <- vector("list", length(means))
for (i in 1:length(means)) {
  out[[i]] <- rnorm(10, means[[i]])
}
```
  
  
-   seq_along(x) 在循环中更严谨 

```{r for3, echo = TRUE,prompt=FALSE}
means <- c()
out <- vector("list", length(means))
for (i in seq_along(means)) {
  out[[i]] <- rnorm(10, means[[i]])
}
```  
  

# 其他循环函数：{.nextsteps }
- while(condition) action: 执行 action while condition 为真
  
- repeat(action): 多次重复 action  (直到遇到break的条件)   
  
```{r while.re, echo = T,prompt=F}


i <- 0
while (i<5) 
{
  print("I'm happy")
  i=i+1
}

i <- 0
repeat {
  print("Hi")
  i <- i + 1
  if (i > 4)
    break
}

```
